title: coleus cambodianus
intro: Coleus cambodianus, a type of flowering plant, is a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Coleus cambodianus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
